ValidationRule.description: MIS-2834: If the Strategic Pod is not null -> Subtype, Industry & Industry_Sub_Type must be null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISBLANK(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c)), OR( ISBLANK(Industry_Subtype__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(SW_Industry__c)), ISBLANK(Sub_Division__c) ) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c))), BEGINS(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c), "NAL"), ISBLANK(Sub_Division__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c))), NOT(BEGINS(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c), "NAL")), OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Industry_Subtype__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(SW_Industry__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(Sub_Division__c)) ) ), AND( OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Industry_Subtype__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(SW_Industry__c))) ), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c))) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When Strategic Pod is populated Start with NAL value you must enter Sub Division otherwise the other fields must be blank (Industry & Sub Division & Sub Type)
